caption: A man is seated in a podcast studio setting, wearing a black t-shirt, a black baseball cap, and over-ear headphones. He has a gold chain around his neck and a watch on his left wrist. He sits behind a professional microphone and rests his chin on his hand in a thoughtful pose. In the background, a white wall features a logo with the words "BOSS HUSTLE" and several stars. To the right, a screen displays partial text, including "K 101". On-screen graphics include a logo that reads "BOSS TALK PODCAST" on the left and "BOSS TALK 101" on the right, accompanied by smaller text that says "Be the Influence". Across the sequence of frames, the man remains in a nearly identical position, with only subtle shifts in his facial expression and posture as he listens or prepares to speak.
